title: Comparing orchestrators by feature attributes
description: Explore orchestrator tradeoffs across open source, license, hosting, and capabilities—feature-attribute comparison, not a benchmark leaderboard.
contextSentence: When you need to compare agent orchestrators by concrete feature attributes—not by benchmark scores or product marketing—start from the committed feature registry and read columns against rows.
takeaway: Treat orchestrator choice as an attribute exploration problem: pick the systems you care about, filter on hosting and capabilities that must all match, and sort or focus the matrix until the tradeoffs are visible.

matrix.emptyMessage: No orchestrators match the current filters and column selection.
